name: hcportal_getLandingPageData
description: Returns landing page data for an authenticated portal user. Updates FCM token on device if changed, logs portal access, and returns user profile and list of kennels the user follows (with membership status, mismanagement roles, and kennel details).

parameters.name: publicHasherId
parameters.description: Auth: The user's public ID. Validated for NULL and byte length (must be exactly 16 bytes). Used for authentication and to identify the user.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token validated via HC.CHECK_PORTAL_ACCESS_TOKEN.

parameters.name: fcmToken
parameters.description: Firebase Cloud Messaging token for push notifications. If changed, the Device record is updated.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: The device ID for the portal session. Used to update FCM token if changed.

parameters.name: ipAddress
parameters.description: Client IP address. Used in LOG.GeneralLog message field.

parameters.name: ipGeoDetails
parameters.description: IP geolocation JSON. Stored in LOG.GeneralLog data field. Falls back to a placeholder JSON if NULL.

rowsets.description: Uses errorType codes 2 (validation) and 3 (auth). Returned when validation or authentication fails. Multiple error conditions do not short-circuit (all validation runs), but only the first error is returned due to early RETURN.

rowsets.name: UserProfile
rowsets.description: User profile information. Returned once on success.

columns.name: firstName
columns.description: User's first name. COALESCE to empty string.

columns.name: lastName
columns.description: User's last name. COALESCE to empty string.

columns.name: hashName
columns.description: User's hash name. COALESCE to empty string.

columns.name: displayName
columns.description: User's display name (computed from NameDisplayPreference). COALESCE to empty string.

rowsets.name: KennelList
rowsets.description: List of kennels the user is following. Joins Hasher, HasherKennelMap, Kennel, City, Country tables. Only returns kennels where Following = 1.

columns.name: defaultCurrencySymbol
columns.description: Currency symbol (coalesced from Kennel.CurrencySymbol or Country.CurrencySymbol)

columns.name: defaultDigitsAfterDecimal
columns.description: Digits after decimal for currency (coalesced from Kennel.DigitsAfterDecimal or Country.DigitsAfterDecimal)

columns.name: defaultRunStartTime
columns.description: Default run start time (cast from Kennel.DefaultRunStartTime TIME to DATETIME)

columns.name: isFollowing
columns.description: Whether user is following the kennel (always 1 due to WHERE clause)

columns.name: isMember
columns.description: Whether user is a current member (1 if membershipExpirationDate > getdate(), else 0)

columns.name: isHomeKennel
columns.description: Whether this is the user's home kennel (1 if Hasher.HomeKennelId = Kennel.id, else 0)

columns.name: appAccessFlags
columns.description: App access flags for the user-kennel relationship

sideEffects: INSERT into HC.ErrorLog on validation/auth failures
INSERT into LOG.GeneralLog on every call (after validation)
UPDATE HC.Device.FcmToken if @fcmToken differs from stored value
INSERT into HC.PortalAccess (hasherId) to log portal access

codeSmells.detail: Line 25: Uses DATALENGTH(@publicHasherId) != 16 to validate UNIQUEIDENTIFIER. Should use LEN or IS NULL check only. DATALENGTH returns byte count which works for UNIQUEIDENTIFIER (16 bytes) but is inconsistent with string validation best practices.
SET NOCOUNT ON is present but SET XACT_ABORT ON is missing. Runtime errors will not auto-rollback.
The entire SP has no error handling. If any UPDATE or INSERT fails, the error propagates unhandled to the caller.
UPDATE Device and INSERT PortalAccess are not wrapped in a transaction. If the SP fails partway through, these changes persist orphaned.
Line 85: LogSource is 'Admin Portal: hcportal_getKennelHashers' but this SP is hcportal_getLandingPageData. Copy-paste error from another SP.
Lines 41-58: Large block of commented-out validation code for checking if @publicHasherId exists in Hasher table. This suggests the validation was removed but the code was left as documentation.
Lines 97-99: UPDATE runs even on error (before @isError check). Should only run on success path.

Validation blocks run regardless of prior failures. Each failed check SELECTs an error rowset but does not RETURN immediately. If multiple validations fail, the caller receives multiple error rowsets.
Line 88: Uses 'Getdate()' instead of 'GETDATE()' (SQL is case-insensitive but consistency aids readability).
Line 91: Uses lowercase 'if' instead of uppercase 'IF' (inconsistent with rest of SP).

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
Never change errorType integer codes without updating all callers
